vij=xij−xˉjv_{ij} = x_{ij} - \bar{x}_jvij​=xij​−xˉj​
xˉj=1N∑i=1Nxij\bar{x}_j = \frac{1}{N} \sum^N_{i=1} x_{ij}xˉj​=N1​∑i=1N​xij​
zij=vijsi=xij−xˉisiz_{ij} = \frac{ v_{ij} }{ s_{i} } = \frac{ x_{ij} - \bar{x}_i }{ s_i }zij​=si​vij​​=si​xij​−xˉi​​

children.value: 標本積率、標本共分散、標本相関係数はそれぞれ

children.html: mij=1N∑k=1Nxikxjksij=1N∑k=1Nvikvjk=1N∑k=1N(xik−xˉi)(xjk−xˉj)rij=1N∑k=1Nzikzjk=1N∑k=1Nviksivjksj=1N∑k=1Nxik−xˉisixjk−xˉjsj\begin{align} m_{ij} &= \frac{1}{N} \sum^N_{k=1} x_{ik} x_{jk} \\ s_{ij} &= \frac{1}{N} \sum_{k=1}^N v_{ik} v_{jk} = \frac{1}{N} \sum_{k=1}^N (x_{ik} - \bar{x}_i)(x_{jk} - \bar{x}_j) \\ r_{ij} &= \frac{1}{N} \sum_{k=1}^N z_{ik} z_{jk} = \frac{1}{N} \sum_{k=1}^N \frac{v_{ik}}{s_i} \frac{v_{jk}}{s_j} = \frac{1}{N} \sum_{k=1}^N \frac{x_{ik} - \bar{x}_i}{s_i} \frac{x_{jk} - \bar{x}_j}{s_j} \end{align}mij​sij​rij​​=N1​k=1∑N​xik​xjk​=N1​k=1∑N​vik​vjk​=N1​k=1∑N​(xik​−xˉi​)(xjk​−xˉj​)=N1​k=1∑N​zik​zjk​=N1​k=1∑N​si​vik​​sj​vjk​​=N1​k=1∑N​si​xik​−xˉi​​sj​xjk​−xˉj​​​​

children.value: 母積率、母共分散、母相関係数は

\begin{align}
\sigma_{mij} &= E[x_i x_j]\\
\sigma_{ij} &= E[v_i v_j] = E[(x_i - \mu_i)(x_j - \mu_j)]\\
\sigma_{rij} &= E[z_i z_j]
    = E\left[\left(\frac{x_i - \mu_i}{ \sigma_i }\right)
        \left(\frac{x_j - \mu_j}{ \sigma_j }\right)\right]
\end{align}
children.html: σmij=E[xixj]σij=E[vivj]=E[(xi−μi)(xj−μj)]σrij=E[zizj]=E[(xi−μiσi)(xj−μjσj)]\begin{align} \sigma_{mij} &= E[x_i x_j]\\ \sigma_{ij} &= E[v_i v_j] = E[(x_i - \mu_i)(x_j - \mu_j)]\\ \sigma_{rij} &= E[z_i z_j] = E\left[\left(\frac{x_i - \mu_i}{ \sigma_i }\right) \left(\frac{x_j - \mu_j}{ \sigma_j }\right)\right] \end{align}σmij​σij​σrij​​=E[xi​xj​]=E[vi​vj​]=E[(xi​−μi​)(xj​−μj​)]=E[zi​zj​]=E[(σi​xi​−μi​​)(σj​xj​−μj​​)]​​
